opaqueError: This invitation isn't usable. Ask whoever sent it for a new one.

signedIn.title: Join this organization
signedIn.body: You're signed in as {email}. Accept to join.

emailMismatch.title: Heads up — different email
emailMismatch.body: This invitation was addressed to {inviteEmail}, but you're signed in as {sessionEmail}. The backend will only accept it if both addresses match.

signedOut.title: You've been invited
signedOut.body: Create an account or sign in to accept this invitation.
signedOut.bodyWithEmail: The invitation was sent to {email}. Create an account or sign in to accept.
